title: Rename device - turn off/on the device
scenario: Custom device name does not persist after power cycling the device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with the device connected.
6. Turn the device off (press and hold the Power button until it powers down).
7. Turn the device back on (press and hold the Power button until it powers on).
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and check the device name on the Home screen.
9. Navigate to Device Settings and verify the device name displayed there.
expected: The custom device name is still displayed on both the Home screen and the Device Settings screen after power cycling.
